text: Our streaming platform's ad-insertion engine embeds inaudible audio tones in content at frequencies calibrated to prime listeners for brand recall; the tones are not perceptible to the conscious hearing range but have been shown in internal testing to increase purchase intent by 18%.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(a): subliminal techniques bypassing conscious awareness to influence behaviour

text: The UI optimisation system deployed in our pension sales portal detects when elderly users exhibit hesitation patterns — repeated back-navigation, long dwell times on fee disclosure pages — and dynamically simplifies the interface to reduce friction and increase sign-up completion rates.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(b): exploits age-related vulnerability (cognitive hesitation) to distort behaviour materially

text: The municipal social-credit scoring platform aggregates fine-payment history, public transport fare evasion records, and noise complaints to assign each resident a compliance score; low-scoring residents are de-prioritised in the queue for social housing and parking permits.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(c): social scoring by public authority — access to social services conditioned on score

text: The city-centre CCTV management system uses real-time facial recognition to scan all pedestrians passing 340 camera nodes, matching faces against a local police watchlist and an inter-agency terrorism suspect database; officers are dispatched when a match confidence exceeds 0.85.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(d): real-time remote biometric identification in publicly accessible space

text: The primary school emotion-sensing platform uses webcam-based facial action unit analysis to continuously monitor student attention and emotional states throughout lessons; teachers receive a live class-mood heatmap and a per-pupil engagement score that is incorporated into end-of-term reports.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(a)/(f): emotion recognition in education; manipulates educational assessment; distorts behaviour

text: Our call-centre AI analyses agents' vocal tone, speech tempo, and micro-pauses in real time to generate an emotional-state score; the score is used by supervisors to identify agents showing signs of low motivation for targeted performance management conversations.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(f): emotion recognition in workplace context for performance management purposes

text: The police intelligence platform uses a scoring algorithm to assign each individual on the watchlist a preventive-arrest priority score based on historical association network data, social media behaviour, and inferred political affiliation; officers use the score to determine who to proactively detain for questioning before public events.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(c)/(d): social scoring + predictive policing targeting individuals based on behaviour/affiliation

text: The streaming video service uses subliminal single-frame image insertions — imperceptible at normal playback speed — to associate competitor brand names with negative imagery, reducing viewers' stated preference for competitor products in subsequent surveys.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(a): subliminal technique to influence brand perception below conscious awareness

text: Our consumer lending app's AI detects from browsing behaviour and in-app navigation patterns that a user is in a state of financial anxiety; it automatically surfaces high-interest credit offers with simplified repayment messaging timed to moments of peak detected desperation.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(b): exploits financial vulnerability to distort behaviour materially to user's detriment

text: The border enforcement AI analyses asylum seekers' social media posts, messaging-app activity, and stated journey narrative to produce a credibility score; low-scoring individuals are flagged as likely economic migrants and their applications are deprioritised without individual officer review.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(c): social scoring by public authority (immigration) based on behaviour/lifestyle data affecting rights

text: Das Echtzeitüberwachungssystem des Einkaufszentrums scannt die Gesichter aller Besucher und gleicht sie kontinuierlich mit einer Ladendiebstahls-Datenbank ab; bei einem Treffer wird automatisch Sicherheitspersonal benachrichtigt und der Verdächtige verfolgt.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(d): German — real-time biometric identification in public shopping mall

text: Das städtische Sozialpunktesystem bewertet alle Einwohner anhand von Steuerkonformität, Ordnungswidrigkeiten und Sozialverhalten; Bewohner mit niedrigen Punktzahlen erhalten keinen vorrangigen Zugang zu kommunalen Diensten und Vergünstigungen.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(c): German — public authority social scoring affecting access to public services

text: The insurance claims AI analyses claimants' facial expressions from video interviews to infer whether they are being truthful; a deception-likelihood score is included in the claim handler's decision support dashboard and influences whether additional investigation is triggered.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(f): emotion recognition to infer psychological states — truthfulness inference in high-stakes context

text: The HR performance review system captures continuous webcam and keyboard-activity telemetry from remote workers and uses an AI to derive an inferred engagement and emotional wellbeing score; managers receive weekly trend charts per employee that feed directly into the annual performance rating.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(f): workplace emotion/engagement recognition from biometric signals, continuous surveillance

text: Our personalised e-commerce pricing engine detects from device type, browsing history, and inferred income proxy signals that certain users are less price-sensitive; it presents inflated prices to these users while displaying lower prices in the same session to other users, without disclosing the differentiation.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(b): exploits inferred vulnerability (willingness-to-pay) to distort economic behaviour materially to user's detriment

text: The stadium-wide facial recognition system deployed at a major sports venue scans all spectators entering and throughout the event, continuously checking all faces against national law enforcement databases for outstanding warrants.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(d): real-time biometric mass surveillance in publicly accessible sports venue

text: The social media content moderation AI analyses users' post history, like patterns, and group memberships to produce a political-alignment score; users with high scores for certain political orientations are down-ranked in recommendation feeds and subjected to additional content review delays.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(c): social scoring based on political opinion affecting fundamental rights (expression, access)

text: The gambling platform's retention AI detects from in-session betting pattern changes that a player is entering a loss-chasing state; it responds by serving targeted in-session bonus offers and reduced withdrawal friction messaging at the precise moment of detected vulnerability.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(b): exploits psychological vulnerability (problem gambling state) in real time to distort behaviour

text: The school district's AI assigns each student a social-behaviour compliance score based on peer reports, disciplinary records, and inferred attitude signals; scores below a threshold restrict students' access to elective courses, sports teams, and school trips.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(c): social scoring by public institution (school) restricting access to educational opportunities

text: Das verdeckte KI-Überwachungssystem der Stadtpolizei analysiert Mobilfunkdaten, Standortverläufe und Kreditkartentransaktionen politischer Aktivisten, um Teilnehmer an geplanten Demonstrationen vorab zu identifizieren und präventiv vorzuladen.
label: prohibited
note: Article 5(1)(c)/(d): German — covert AI profiling of activists for pre-emptive law enforcement action

text: Our occupational health research team uses an AI to detect mood and stress patterns from facial expression data collected with employees' written informed consent during voluntary wellness check-ins; results are used only in aggregate to improve workplace wellbeing programme design and are never linked to individual employment records.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: emotion recognition but with genuine informed consent, research context, aggregate use only — not prohibited

text: The smartphone's facial recognition system unlocks the device only for the registered owner; the biometric template is processed entirely on-device and never transmitted to a server or matched against any external database.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: biometric but on-device authentication for personal device — not real-time mass identification in public space

text: The factory floor's AI vision system monitors worker posture and movement for ergonomic safety purposes; workers are informed that monitoring occurs for occupational health compliance, alerts go to the safety team rather than HR, and no individual performance records are generated.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: workplace monitoring but safety purpose with disclosure, not emotion recognition, no performance scoring

text: The customer feedback analysis platform uses sentiment analysis on text reviews and support tickets to identify recurring product pain points and measure Net Promoter Score trends; all analysis is at aggregate segment level and no individual consumer is scored or affected.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: sentiment/emotion-adjacent but purely aggregate, commercial research — no individual effect

text: Our bank's real-time transaction fraud detection system analyses each card transaction for anomaly patterns and can temporarily block a card if a transaction matches known fraud signatures; the cardholder is immediately notified and can confirm the transaction to lift the block.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: real-time automated action on individuals but fraud protection purpose with immediate override — not social scoring or biometric surveillance

text: The creditworthiness AI scores mortgage applications using financial history, income verification, and property valuation data to produce a credit score that determines loan terms; the applicant receives a written explanation of the main factors and can appeal to a human underwriter.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: individual scoring but creditworthiness (high-risk, not prohibited) with explanation rights

text: The university's AI proctoring tool during exams monitors screen activity and flags suspicious keystroke patterns or application switching for human invigilator review; students are informed of monitoring in the exam instructions and the AI cannot issue penalties independently.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: involves monitoring in education but for exam integrity, disclosed, human decides on flags — not emotion recognition or social scoring

text: The law enforcement AI matches DNA profiles uploaded from crime scene samples against a national forensic DNA database to identify potential suspects; each match is reviewed by a forensic analyst before being included in an investigation report.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: biometric identification by law enforcement but is forensic DNA — not real-time remote biometric in public, and with human review; high-risk but not prohibited

text: Our internal helpdesk spam classifier automatically routes emails to spam if they match learned patterns of phishing or mass marketing; senders receive a bounce notice and can resubmit to a human reviewer.
label: not_prohibited
note: Spam filtering — no rights impact, no individual assessment, not a prohibited practice

text: The logistics network optimisation AI determines truck route sequences to minimise fuel consumption and delivery window violations; it operates entirely on vehicle and parcel data and makes no assessments of individuals.
label: not_prohibited
note: Route optimisation — no individual assessment, no prohibited practice

text: Das biometrische Zutrittssystem für das Unternehmensrechenzentrum scannt den Fingerabdruck jedes autorisierten Mitarbeiters beim Betreten; das Biometrietemplate wird nur lokal verarbeitet und nicht mit externen Datenbanken abgeglichen.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: German biometric access control — on-premise, authorised employees only, not public-space mass surveillance

text: Das KI-System empfiehlt Lehrkräften geeignete Förderprogramme für Schülerinnen und Schüler mit erkannten Lernschwächen; Lehrkräfte entscheiden selbst, welche Empfehlungen umgesetzt werden, und die Empfehlungen haben keinen Einfluss auf Noten oder Abschlüsse.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: German AI in education but purely for teacher recommendation support — high-risk possibly, not prohibited

text: Our news aggregation platform's personalisation algorithm selects which articles to display first for each user based on their reading history and topic affinities; users can disable personalisation and view a chronological feed at any time.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: personalisation involves inferring user preferences but editorial content, not manipulation of fundamental behaviour below consciousness

text: The AI content moderation tool flags user posts that violate community guidelines on hate speech and violent content for human moderator review; the tool does not automatically remove content and moderators make all removal decisions.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: involves expression/speech but flags for human review, no autonomous restriction — not a prohibited practice

text: Our clinical decision support system suggests treatment options and drug dosing ranges to oncologists based on tumour genomics and published clinical guideline data; the system is explicit that all clinical decisions remain with the treating physician.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: medical AI but decision-support only — explicitly maintains physician authority; high-risk not prohibited

text: The programmatic advertising platform targets display ads at users who have browsed similar product categories in the past 30 days; targeting is based on declared interest segments and does not use real-time emotional state, vulnerability detection, or subliminal techniques.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: targeted advertising but no subliminal technique, no vulnerability exploitation — standard commercial targeting

text: Our corporate training platform uses an AI to assess competency after each learning module through scenario-based quizzes and assigns a mastery score; managers can view aggregated team-level competency dashboards and suggest development paths.
label: not_prohibited
note: HARD: involves workplace assessment but for voluntary training only — not employment evaluation with significant effects

text: The geopolitical risk intelligence tool analyses publicly available news, sanctions lists, and financial disclosures to score third-party vendors by country exposure and regulatory risk; the output is used by the procurement team for supplier portfolio management.
label: not_prohibited
note: B2B supply chain risk — assesses organisations not individuals; no fundamental rights impact

text: Our AI-assisted legal research tool retrieves relevant case law and statutory provisions when a solicitor inputs the key facts of a case; the tool provides citations and summaries and has no capacity to issue legal advice or make decisions.
label: not_prohibited
note: Legal research assistant — supports professional, no decision-making on persons' rights

text: The building energy management system uses an AI to predict heating and cooling demand based on occupancy sensors, weather forecasts, and calendar data, and adjusts the HVAC system automatically to reduce energy consumption while meeting comfort setpoints.
label: not_prohibited
note: Facility management AI — no assessment of persons, no fundamental rights impact, not prohibited
